user_story: As a System admin, I want to add a new numbering series, so that documents and IDs are generated with a consistent format
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configure Series screen; When I click Add new series and define the rule and name; Then the new series is saved and listed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to view an existing series and its applicability, so that I understand where each numbering rule applies
acceptance_criteria: Given series exist; When I click View on a series; Then its rule/template, name and applicability are displayed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to edit a numbering series, so that I can update the format for offer letters, employee codes or asset IDs
acceptance_criteria: Given a series is listed; When I click Edit and change its configuration; Then the updated series is saved

user_story: As a System admin, I want to page through and refresh the series list, so that I can review all configured generation rules
acceptance_criteria: Given more series exist than one page; When I use pagination or Refresh; Then the series list reloads with the current entries
